decisions.title: Project X Documentation Architecture
decisions.context: The previous Documentation Centre risked becoming too broad and overlapping with engineering documentation, user guidance and knowledge records.
decisions.decision: Documentation is separated into Help Centre, Development Studio and Document Library.
consequences: User guidance is kept separate from engineering documentation.
Architecture and roadmap decisions are tracked in Development Studio.
Published files are managed through the Document Library.
Knowledge attached to lessons remains part of the Knowledge Engine, not generic documentation.

decisions.title: Unified Teaching Database
decisions.context: Project X requires one authoritative source of truth for curriculum, assessment, AI outputs and analytics. The uploaded exam_system.db already models these domains.
decisions.decision: Adopt the SQLite database as the canonical development database and export JSON views for the static web runtime.
consequences: Schemes, units, lessons, questions, mark schemes and analytics can be connected through one model.
LocalStorage and JSON become runtime/cache layers, not the long-term source of truth.
Legacy tables are retained for audit but not used for new features.
Future OCR specification imports should map into spec_topics and spec_points.
